# discord_local_file (Data Source)

Reads a local file into a base64 data URI for the provider's `*_data_uri` attributes (images, audio, sticker files). The mime type is detected from the file extension unless `mime` is set.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Path to the local file.

### Optional

- `mime` (String) Mime type to use. Defaults to one detected from the file extension.

### Read-Only

- `data_uri` (String) The file as a `data:<mime>;base64,...` URI.
